cleavage agent: After the samples were digested by trypsin
enrichment method: gently shaken with pre-washed acetyl resin
fractionation method: the peptides were separated into 60 fractions
instrument: analyzed by mass spectrometry (Q ExactiveTM Plus)
ionization type: injected into a nanospray ionization source
labeling: the peptides were labelled following the instructions of the tandem mass tag (TMT) kit
